name: Domestic Surveillance Network
description: Mass surveillance infrastructure including CCTV networks, facial recognition, social media monitoring, and communications intercept capabilities. Provides internal security awareness at the cost of civil liberties.

specialAbilities.name: AI Facial Recognition
specialAbilities.description: Identifies persons of interest in real-time across the national CCTV grid, enabling rapid location of dissidents and fugitives.

specialAbilities.name: Social Monitoring System
specialAbilities.description: Tracks citizen behavior and social connections to predict and preemptively suppress organized dissent.
